'''Mount Meru''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] on the planet [[Drogheda/Legends|Drogheda]]. It was the location of the [[Mount Meru Mine]] and was the temporary headquarters of a [[Drogheda Revolutionaries|revolutionary group]] that waged war with the reigning [[Monarchy/Legends|monarchy]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Working on behalf of the reigning [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Sarna (Queen)|Sarna]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] hero [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] flushed the revolutionaries out of the mine by destroying several water tanks within.<ref name="marvel83" />
